conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C and dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C and for PS at 95 °Csall with C18 bonded silica gel.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in single eluent (acetonitrile) on C18 bonded silica
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.notes: Also used for separation of stereoregularity (isotactic vs syndiotactic).

conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C and dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C and for PS at 95 °Csall with C18 bonded silica gel.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in single eluent (dimethylformamide) on C18 bonded silica
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.notes: Temperature is far above tabulated Theta point; system may exhibit two Theta points.

conditions.evidence_text: The critical conditions have been identified in some single eluents which are thermodynamicaly poor solvents for polymers investigated, namely, acetonitrile for PMMA at 66 °C and dimethylformamide for PnBMA at 154 °C and for PS at 95 °Csall with C18 bonded silica gel.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in single eluent (dimethylformamide) on C18 bonded silica
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.notes: Used for separation of block and graft copolymers of styrene and methyl methacrylate.

conditions.evidence_text: A 'criticallike' elution was also observed in cyclohexane for PS at 9 °C with silica gel C18 packing, which is well below the θ temperature.
conditions.critical_condition_basis: Temperature adjustment in single eluent (cyclohexane) on C18 bonded silica
conditions.stationary_phase_chemistry: Silica gel bonded with C18 phase
conditions.notes: Described as 'criticallike' elution; higher molar masses underwent phase separation.
